title: トウカイテイオー登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My days with the ultra-talented Tokai Teio have
just begun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She highly admires the student council president,
Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's on a journey to surpass her role model and
become the ultimate runner!
